sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40352" key="e)pinuktereu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπινυκτ-ερεύω</orth>, <sense id="n40352.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pass the night at</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ναυσί</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1414.tlg001:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heraclit.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">All.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; of water, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stand for a night</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.690c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
